mapper.select:
SELECT /* 회원 */ (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE ROLE = 'USER') AS memberCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE TRUNC(created_at) = TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS todayNewMembers,
( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE TRUNC(created_at) = TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE TRUNC(created_at) = TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - 1) ) AS memberChange,
/* 축제 */ (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM festival_info) AS festivalCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM festival_info WHERE NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y') AS visibleFestivalCount,
( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM festival_info WHERE SUBSTR(created_time, 1, 8) = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYYMMDD')) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM festival_info WHERE SUBSTR(created_time, 1, 8) = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - 1, 'YYYYMMDD')) ) AS festivalChange,
/* 게시글 */ (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post WHERE NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y' AND category != 'NOTICE') AS postCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post WHERE NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y' AND category != 'NOTICE' AND TRUNC(created_at) = TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS todayPostCount,
( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post WHERE NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y' AND category != 'NOTICE' AND TRUNC(created_at) = TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post WHERE NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y' AND category != 'NOTICE' AND TRUNC(created_at) = TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - 1) ) AS postChange,
/* 신고 */ (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_report) AS reportCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_report WHERE NVL(status, '접수') IN ('접수', '검토중')) AS waitingReportCount,
( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_report WHERE TRUNC(created_at) = TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_report WHERE TRUNC(created_at) = TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - 1) ) AS reportChange,
/* 문의 */ (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_inquiry WHERE NVL(status, 'PENDING') = 'PENDING') AS waitingInquiryCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_inquiry WHERE TRUNC(created_at) = TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS todayInquiryCount,
( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_inquiry WHERE TRUNC(created_at) = TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_inquiry WHERE TRUNC(created_at) = TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - 1) ) AS inquiryChange,
/* 공지 */ (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post WHERE category = 'NOTICE') AS noticeCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post WHERE category = 'NOTICE' AND NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y') AS visibleNoticeCount,
( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post WHERE category = 'NOTICE' AND TRUNC(created_at) = TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post WHERE category = 'NOTICE' AND TRUNC(created_at) = TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - 1) ) AS noticeChange
FROM dual

SELECT TO_CHAR(d.base_date, 'MM/DD') AS day, NVL(m.member_count, 0) AS members, NVL(p.post_count, 0) AS posts, NVL(r.report_count, 0) AS reports FROM ( SELECT TRUNC(TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) - 7 + LEVEL AS base_date FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 7 ) d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TRUNC(created_at) AS created_date, COUNT(*) AS member_count FROM member WHERE created_at >= TRUNC(TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) - 6 AND created_at < TRUNC(TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) + 1 GROUP BY TRUNC(created_at) ) m ON d.base_date = m.created_date LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TRUNC(created_at) AS created_date, COUNT(*) AS post_count FROM community_post WHERE created_at >= TRUNC(TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) - 6 AND created_at < TRUNC(TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) + 1 AND NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y' AND category != 'NOTICE' GROUP BY TRUNC(created_at) ) p ON d.base_date = p.created_date LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TRUNC(created_at) AS created_date, COUNT(*) AS report_count FROM post_report WHERE created_at >= TRUNC(TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) - 6 AND created_at < TRUNC(TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) + 1 GROUP BY TRUNC(created_at) ) r ON d.base_date = r.created_date ORDER BY d.base_date

SELECT status AS label, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'N' THEN '숨김' WHEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN event_start_date AND event_end_date THEN '진행중' WHEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYYMMDD') < event_start_date THEN '예정' WHEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYYMMDD') > event_end_date THEN '종료' ELSE '기타' END AS status FROM festival_info ) GROUP BY status ORDER BY CASE status WHEN '진행중' THEN 1 WHEN '예정' THEN 2 WHEN '종료' THEN 3 WHEN '숨김' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(addr1, 1, 2) AS region, COUNT(*) AS count FROM festival_info WHERE NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y' AND addr1 IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SUBSTR(addr1, 1, 2) ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT ROWNUM AS rank, name, region, views, likes, status, firstImage FROM ( SELECT title AS name, addr1 AS region, first_image AS firstImage, NVL(view_count, 0) AS views, NVL(like_count, 0) AS likes, CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN event_start_date AND event_end_date THEN '진행중' WHEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYYMMDD') < event_start_date THEN '예정' WHEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYYMMDD') > event_end_date THEN '종료' ELSE '기타' END AS status FROM festival_info WHERE NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY NVL(view_count, 0) DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'RPT-' || LPAD(pr.report_id, 5, '0') AS id,
CASE LOWER(pr.reason) WHEN 'inappropriate' THEN '부적절한 내용' WHEN 'ad_spam' THEN '광고/도배' WHEN 'spam' THEN '광고/도배' WHEN 'abuse' THEN '욕설/비방' WHEN 'abusive' THEN '욕설/비방' WHEN 'privacy' THEN '개인정보 노출' WHEN 'false_info' THEN '허위 정보' WHEN 'etc' THEN '기타' ELSE pr.reason END AS report_type,
CASE WHEN cp.post_id IS NULL THEN '삭제되었거나 확인 불가한 게시글' ELSE cp.title END AS target,
CASE WHEN m.nickname IS NOT NULL THEN m.nickname WHEN LENGTH(pr.member_id) > 18 THEN SUBSTR(pr.member_id, 1, 10) || '...' || SUBSTR(pr.member_id, -4) ELSE pr.member_id END AS reporter,
TO_CHAR(pr.created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS report_date,
CASE WHEN pr.status IS NULL THEN '접수' WHEN pr.status = 'PENDING' THEN '접수' WHEN pr.status = 'WAITING' THEN '접수' WHEN pr.status = 'PROCESSING' THEN '검토중' WHEN pr.status = 'DONE' THEN '완료' WHEN pr.status = 'COMPLETED' THEN '완료' WHEN pr.status = 'REJECTED' THEN '반려' ELSE pr.status END AS status,
pr.created_at FROM post_report pr LEFT JOIN community_post cp ON pr.post_id = cp.post_id LEFT JOIN member m ON pr.member_id = m.member_id ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 4

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'inquiry' AS issue_type, '새 문의가 접수되었습니다.' AS title, title AS description, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS issue_time, CASE WHEN status = 'PENDING' THEN '대기' WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN '완료' ELSE status END AS status, created_at FROM user_inquiry WHERE NVL(status, 'PENDING') = 'PENDING' AND created_at < TRUNC(TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) + 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'report' AS issue_type, '신고 검토가 필요합니다.' AS title, reason AS description, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS issue_time, NVL(status, '접수') AS status, created_at FROM post_report WHERE NVL(status, '접수') IN ('접수', '검토중') AND created_at < TRUNC(TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) + 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'notice' AS issue_type, '공지사항 노출 상태를 확인하세요.' AS title, title AS description, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS issue_time, CASE WHEN NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y' THEN '노출' ELSE '숨김' END AS status, created_at FROM community_post WHERE category = 'NOTICE' AND created_at < TRUNC(TO_DATE(#{baseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) + 1 ) ORDER BY created_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 4
